Ar ais chuig mo chuid orduithe

Withdrawal Settings: Please enter your order number and the email address used for the order to find your order.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Cuir isteach d'uimhir ordaithe agus an seoladh ríomhphoist a úsáideadh don ordú.

Socruithe aistarraingthe: Trí aistarraingt a chur isteach, dearbhaíonn tú gur mian leat conradh ceannaigh an ordaithe seo a chúlghairm.

Socruithe aistarraingthe: Tá iarratas aistarraingthe curtha isteach cheana don ordú seo.

Socruithe aistarraingthe: Tá tréimhse aistarraingthe an ordaithe seo caite. Ba é an spriocdháta: %1

Withdrawal Settings: Are you sure you want to submit the withdrawal for this order? This action cannot be undone.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: An bhfuil tú cinnte gur mian leat aistarraingt a chur isteach don ordú seo? Ní féidir an gníomh seo a chealú.

Withdrawal Settings: The order could not be found.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Níorbh fhéidir an t-ordú a fháil.

Socruithe aistarraingthe: Níl údarás agat an t-ordú seo a aistarraingt.

Socruithe aistarraingthe: Tá iarratas aistarraingthe ann cheana don ordú seo.

Withdrawal Settings: Please enter both order number and email address.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Cuir isteach an uimhir ordaithe agus an seoladh ríomhphoist araon.

Withdrawal Settings: No order found with the given order number and email address.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Níor aimsíodh aon ordú leis an uimhir ordaithe agus seoladh ríomhphoist a tugadh.

Withdrawal Settings: Enable or disable the withdrawal button functionality.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Cumasaigh nó díchumasaigh feidhmiúlacht an chnaipe aistarraingthe.

Withdrawal Settings: Email address to receive withdrawal notifications. If empty, the general store email will be used.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Seoladh ríomhphoist chun fógraí aistarraingthe a fháil. Má tá sé folamh, úsáidfear ríomhphost ginearálta an tsiopa.

Withdrawal Settings: Number of days after order placement during which withdrawal is allowed. Default: 14 days.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Líon laethanta tar éis seolta na deireanach seoltaí páirte ina gceadaítear aistarraingt. Réamhshocrú: 14 lá.

Withdrawal Settings: This order has not been shipped yet. You may withdraw at any time until you receive the goods.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Níor seoladh an t-ordú seo go fóill. Féadfaidh tú aistarraingt am ar bith go dtí go bhfaigheann tú na hearraí.

Withdrawal Settings: Email template sent to the customer after withdrawal request.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Teimpléad ríomhphoist a sheoltar chuig an gcustaiméir tar éis an iarratais aistarraingthe.

Withdrawal Settings: Email template sent to the shop owner after withdrawal request.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Teimpléad ríomhphoist a sheoltar chuig úinéir an tsiopa tar éis an iarratais aistarraingthe.

Withdrawal Settings: We have received your withdrawal request for Order #%order_increment_id.
Your withdrawal request has been registered successfully.
The shop will process your withdrawal request and contact you regarding the next steps (e.g. return of goods, refund).
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Próiseálfaidh an siopa d'iarratas aistarraingthe agus rachaidh sé i dteagmháil leat faoi na chéad chéimeanna eile (m.sh. tuairisceán, aisíocaíocht).

Withdrawal Settings: If you have any questions, please contact us.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Má tá aon cheist agat, déan teagmháil linn le do thoil.

Withdrawal Settings: A new withdrawal request has been submitted.
Please review this withdrawal request and take the necessary steps.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Déan athbhreithniú ar an iarratas aistarraingthe seo agus tóg na céimeanna riachtanacha.

Withdrawal Settings: Withdrawal is only possible for orders with one of these statuses. Default: pending, processing, complete.
Socruithe aistarraingthe: Ní féidir aistarraingt ach d'orduithe le ceann de na stádais seo. Réamhshocrú: ar feitheamh, á phróiseáil, críochnaithe.
